Our Story

A Hidden Garden
Gem in Manali

Nestled on Naggar Road in the peaceful Prini area, Fat Plate Cafe is one of Manali's most beloved garden cafes. Surrounded by blooming roses and lush Himalayan greenery, our multi-level lawns offer a serene mountain escape.

We serve fresh farm-to-table dishes, homemade cakes, signature cocktails, and everything from hearty Indian mains to Italian classics — crafted with love, served with warmth.

Whether you're a couple seeking a romantic spot, a family on a Himalayan adventure, or a solo traveller chasing peace — Fat Plate is your home in the mountains.

🌹 Rose Garden 🐾 Pet Friendly 🏔️ Mountain Views 🌿 Farm to Table 🍹 Full Bar ☕ Specialty Coffee

The Family Behind It

The Gurung Family — Bringing Manali's Finest to Your Plate

Anubhav Gurung
Owner & Host
Born in the mountains, cooked with love, served with heart.

Fat Plate is more than a cafe — it's a family legacy rooted in the Himalayas. From our rose-filled garden to every plate we serve, we bring the warmth of a Himachali home to every guest who walks through our door.

A serene spot perfect for couples, families and travellers looking for beauty, peace and delicious food in Manali. We are proud to be a hidden gem on Naggar Road — and even prouder to share it with the world.

Visit Us

Hidden in the garden of Prini — but once you know, you'll always come back.
